image:image.image:title: Tuhin Mohanta - Enterprise Platform Engineering Leader & CTO
image:image.image:caption: Tuhin Mohanta, Chief Technology Officer and Platform Engineering Leader with 20+ years of enterprise architecture experience

image:image.image:title: Featured Talk - Beyond the Hype: Token Dynamics & AI Sovereignty
image:image.image:caption: Homepage featured talk by Tuhin Mohanta on token dynamics, enterprise inference economics, model portability, and AI sovereignty.

image:image.image:title: Featured Talk - Beyond the Hype: Operationalizing AI for the Next Billion
image:image.image:caption: Homepage featured talk from India AI Impact Summit 2026 on operational AI, multilingual systems, and cost-efficient deployment.

image:image.image:title: Featured Talk - After the Summit Lights Fade: Hard Decisions for India's AI Decade
image:image.image:caption: Homepage featured talk for CTOs on AI governance, digital rails, and voice-first execution after India AI Impact Summit 2026.

image:image.image:title: Beyond the Hype: Token Dynamics & AI Sovereignty
image:image.image:caption: Tuhin Mohanta at India AI Impact Summit 2026 on token economics, enterprise inference cost structures, model portability, and AI sovereignty for leaders scaling AI to production.

image:image.image:title: Beyond the Hype: Operationalizing AI for the Next Billion
image:image.image:caption: India AI Impact Summit 2026 field walkthrough by Tuhin Mohanta focused on operational AI execution, custom inferencing hardware, Indic language inclusion, and real-world sector deployment.

image:image.image:title: India AI Impact Summit 2026 - Healthcare AI & Equity Architecture Panel Discussion
image:image.image:caption: Tuhin Mohanta speaking at India AI Kumbh at India AI Impact Summit 2026, discussing healthcare AI, SAHI-BODH-ABHA stack, and responsible AI for population scale systems

image:image.image:title: AI Governance and Talent Acquisition Dialogue with Debashis Sen
image:image.image:caption: Tuhin Mohanta in dialogue with Debashis Sen (IAS veteran, ex Additional Chief Secretary IT) on AI governance, talent acquisition in AI era, and digital public infrastructure

image:image.image:title: After the Summit Lights Fade: Hard Decisions for India's AI Decade
image:image.image:caption: India AI Impact Summit 2026 talk by Tuhin Mohanta on AI roadmaps for CTOs, digital rails strategy, board-level governance, and inclusive voice-first execution.

video:video.video:title: Beyond the Hype: Token Dynamics & AI Sovereignty
video:video.video:description: A strategic leadership talk on token dynamics, enterprise cost structures, and AI sovereignty choices. Explores inference economics, model portability, and governance controls for leaders moving AI from pilots to core operations. Recorded at India AI Impact Summit 2026.

video:video.video:title: Beyond the Hype: Operationalizing AI for the Next Billion
video:video.video:description: India AI Impact Summit 2026 floor walkthrough covering operational AI at scale: custom GPU inferencing for affordability, multilingual AI in 22 Indic languages, and practical deployments across clinical trials, mobility safety, and food hygiene.

video:video.video:title: When Technology Meets Humanity: Inside India's AI Kumbh
video:video.video:description: Pan-India ISB alumni session following India AI Impact Summit 2026. Featuring Tuhin Mohanta on Healthcare AI, equity architecture, SAHI-BODH-ABHA stack for population-scale systems, and responsible AI governance for 1.4 billion people. Enterprise platform engineering perspective on AI-ready healthcare systems.

video:video.video:title: The Present Tense of AI: A Dialogue on Governance and Talent
video:video.video:description: In-depth conversation between Tuhin Mohanta and Debashis Sen (IAS veteran, ex Additional Chief Secretary IT) on AI evolution, talent acquisition in AI era, Learn AI from AI framework, hyper-local linguistic inclusion for rural economy transformation through conversational AI, and AI as Digital Public Infrastructure for India. Enterprise perspective on AI governance and policy impact.

video:video.video:title: After the Summit Lights Fade: Hard Decisions for India's AI Decade
video:video.video:description: India AI Impact Summit 2026 talk for CTOs and technology leaders shaping 12-24 month AI roadmaps. Covers India's AI architecture, SAHI-BODH healthcare governance, offline-first and voice-first design, and board-level governance priorities for inclusive AI execution.
